column.name: ANRED
column.description: Form of address for contact person (Mr, Mrs...etc)

column.name: MOAB1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Monday morning from ...

column.name: MOBI1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Monday morning until ...

column.name: MOAB2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Monday afternoon from ...

column.name: MOBI2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Monday afternoon until ...

column.name: DIAB1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Tuesday morning from...

column.name: DIBI1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Tuesday morning until ...

column.name: DIAB2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Tuesday afternoon from..

column.name: DIBI2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Tuesday afternoon until ...

column.name: MIAB1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Wednesday morning from...

column.name: MIBI1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Wednesday morning until ...

column.name: MIAB2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Wednesday afternoon from ..

column.name: MIBI2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Wednesday afternoon until..

column.name: DOAB1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Thursday morning from ....

column.name: DOBI1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Thursday morning until ....

column.name: DOAB2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Thursday afternoon from...

column.name: DOBI2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Thursday afternoon until ..

column.name: FRAB1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Friday morning from ...

column.name: FRBI1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Friday morning until ...

column.name: FRAB2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Friday afternoon from ...

column.name: FRBI2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Friday afternoon until ...

column.name: SAAB1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Saturday morning from ...

column.name: SABI1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Saturday morning until ...

column.name: SAAB2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Saturday afternoon from ...

column.name: SABI2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Saturday afternoon until ..

column.name: SOAB1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Sunday morning from ...

column.name: SOBI1
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Sunday morning until ...

column.name: SOAB2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Sunday afternoon from ...

column.name: SOBI2
column.description: Contact person's visiting hours: Sunday afternoon until ...

column.name: TITEL_AP
column.description: Title of contact person (description of function)

column.name: ERDAT
column.description: Date on which the Record Was Created

column.name: ERNAM
column.description: Name of Person who Created the Object

column.name: DUEFL
column.description: Status of Data Transfer into Subsequent Release

column.name: LOEVM
column.description: Central Deletion Flag for Master Record

column.name: KZHERK
column.description: Internal indicator for origin of the CP: Customer or Vendor
